name: sir
description: SIR verified-recompose toolkit — the sighted-decompose / blind-re-emit / dual-gate (held-out quorum + saturation differential) methodology, SIR Schema v0.4. The `sir-verify`, `greenfield-quorum`, and `preflight` skills + role agents (sir-decomposer / sir-reemitter(-cr) / sir-factory-runner) that drive the `sir-factory` CLI and verify with `rdv`.
